_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Execute Query branch-8 scenario (job a2f8c3e1, process CustomerOrderReport, folder Reporting). The query executes fine but returns duplicate values in the column the Execute Query DataTable schema infers as the primary/unique key (a one-to-many Customers->Orders JOIN repeats CustomerId), so DataTable.EnableConstraints throws System.Data.ConstraintException 'Failed to enable constraints. One or more rows contain values violating non-null, unique, or foreign-key constraints.' The Error/Info surface names the constraint CATEGORY but NOT which column or why - the cause (SELECT * over a 1-to-many JOIN) is only visible in the workflow SQL, so the diagnosis is not one-shot from the log. Mock dispatcher only; not investigation evidence. Matching is token-aware (quotes/--output ignored); first match wins.

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
